  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:

  the free/open-source version control system.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/VersionControl_SVN
  
  PR:             ports/117693
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net>
